title: Rich Dutch Teque Os Fritters
description: A jammy and bouncy Dutch dish featuring pre-fried teque os, perfect for a brunch mood, this recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for all tastes.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, milk, and a pinch of salt to make a smooth batter.
Heat the butter in a bain-marie or a double boiler over low heat.
Add the pre-fried teque os to the batter and coat them evenly.
Using a spoon, carefully place the coated teque os in the warm butter and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the butter and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess butter.
Serve the fritters warm with a dollop of jam on top.
Sprinkle the fritters with sugar before serving.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
